hero.title: کے بارے میں My دکان
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing online shopping through innovation, quality, and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction

story.title: Making Commerce Better for Everyone
story.p1: Founded in 2024, My دکان emerged from a simple yet powerful vision: to give everyone the tools they need to start, run, and grow a business. We believe entrepreneurship should be accessible to all—whether you're launching your first store or scaling globally.
story.p2: Our journey began when our founders realized that starting an online business was still too complicated. We set out to change that by building a platform that handles everything—from building your storefront to processing payments to shipping worldwide.
story.p3: آج, My دکان powers businesses of all sizes in every industry. سے independent creators to global brands, merchants trust us to be the backbone of their business. We handle the complexity so you can focus on what matters most: your products and customers.
story.p4: Our mission is to make commerce better for everyone. We're building the tools, infrastructure, and support that help entrepreneurs succeed—today and for generations to come.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.subtitle: Our core values guide every decision we make and shape the experience we deliver to our customers

qualityFirst.title: Quality First
qualityFirst.description: We partner with premium brands and carefully curate every product to ensure the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Environmental responsibility is at our core. We're committed to sustainable practices, eco-friendly packaging, and carbon-neutral operations.

customerObsession.title: گاہک Obsession
customerObsession.description: Your satisfaction drives everything we do. سے personalized recommendations to 24/7 support, we're dedicated to exceeding your expectations.

innovation.title: میںnovation
innovation.description: We leverage cutting-edge technology and smart tools to revolutionize your shopping and selling experience.

stats.title: Our Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: These numbers represent the trust you've placed in us and the community we've built together

team.title: Meet Our Leadership
team.subtitle: Passionate individuals dedicated to revolutionizing your shopping experience

sustainability.title: Our Commitment to the Planet
sustainability.description: At My دکان, we believe that great products shouldn't come at the planet's expense. That's why sustainability is woven into every aspect of our business—from the products we offer to how we deliver them to your door.

carbonNeutralShipping.title: Carbon Neutral شپنگ
carbonNeutralShipping.description: سب deliveries are offset through our partnership with verified carbon reduction projects worldwide.

recyclablePackaging.title: 100% Recyclable Packaging
recyclablePackaging.description: Our packaging materials are fully recyclable and made from post-consumer recycled content.

ethicalSourcing.title: Ethical Sourcing
ethicalSourcing.description: We work exclusively with suppliers who meet our strict ethical and environmental standards.

sustainableMaterials.title: Sustainable Materials
sustainableMaterials.description: We prioritize products made from organic, recycled, and sustainably sourced materials.

carbonNeutralCertified.title: Certified Carbon Neutral
carbonNeutralCertified.description: We've achieved carbon neutrality across our entire operation and continue to invest in renewable energy and reforestation projects.

cta.title: Join Our Journey
cta.description: Build your future with My دکان. شروع your business today—no experience needed. Your journey to success starts here.

placeOrder.question: How do I place an order?
placeOrder.answer: Simply browse our products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can pay using various payment methods.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American ایکسپریس), PayPal, and cash on delivery for select areas.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: معیاری shipping takes 5-7 business days. ایکسپریس shipping is available for 2-3 business days delivery.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. رابطہ our support team to initiate a return.

trackOrder.question: How can I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: پرce your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order from your account page.

internationalShipping.question: Do you ship internationally?
internationalShipping.answer: ہاں, we ship to most countries. میںternational shipping times and costs vary by destination.

trackOrder.question: How do I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: پرce your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number and a link to track your package. You can also track your order by logging into your account and visiting the "My آرڈرز" section. Real-time tracking updates are available 24/7, showing you exactly where your package is in transit.

shippingOptions.question: What are the shipping options?
shippingOptions.answer: We offer several shipping options to meet your needs: معیاری شپنگ (5-7 business days, FREE on orders over $50), ایکسپریس شپنگ (2-3 business days, $12.99), اگلا Day ڈیلیوری (1 business day, $24.99), and میںternational شپنگ (7-21 business days, varies by location). شپنگ times are calculated from the date of shipment, not the order date.

internationalShipping.question: Do you ship internationally?
internationalShipping.answer: ہاں! We ship to over 100 countries worldwide. میںternational shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination. Customs duties, taxes, and fees may apply and are the responsibility of the recipient. Please note that some products may have shipping restrictions based on local regulations.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: شپنگ times vary based on your selected shipping method and destination. معیاری shipping typically takes 5-7 business days, ایکسپریس shipping takes 2-3 business days, and اگلا Day delivery arrives within 1 business day. میںternational orders typically arrive within 7-21 business days depending on customs clearance and destination.

lostDamaged.question: What if my package is lost or damaged?
lostDamaged.answer: We take full responsibility for packages that are lost or damaged in transit. If your package shows as delivered but you have not received it, please wait 24 hours and check with neighbors. If still missing, contact our customer service team immediately. For damaged items, please take photos and submit them through our Returns Portal within 48 hours for a full refund or replacement.

changeAddress.question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
changeAddress.answer: If your order has not yet shipped, you can update your shipping address by contacting customer service immediately. پرce an order has shipped, we cannot redirect it to a new address. However, you can contact the shipping carrier directly with your tracking number to request a delivery change.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on most items. مصنوعات must be unused, unwashed, and in their original condition with all tags attached. Items marked as "Final سیل" or personalized products cannot be returned. Swimwear, underwear, and beauty products are also non-returnable for hygiene reasons.

howToReturn.question: How do I return an item?
howToReturn.answer: تک return an item: 1) Log into your account and go to "آرڈر History", 2) منتخب کریں the order and click "Return Items", 3) Choose the items you wish to return and provide a reason, 4) Print the prepaid return shipping label provided, 5) Pack the items securely with all original packaging and tags, 6) Drop off at any authorized shipping location.

refundTime.question: When will I receive my refund?
refundTime.answer: رقم کی واپسیs are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect your returned item. The refund will be issued to your original payment method. Please note that it may take an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear in your account, depending on your bank.

exchange.question: Can I exchange an item?
exchange.answer: ہاں! We make exchanges easy. If you need a different size or color, initiate a return for the original item and place a new order for the replacement. This ensures you get your new item as quickly as possible. Exchange shipping is free for size/color swaps on non-sale items.

defectiveItem.question: What if I received a defective or wrong item?
defectiveItem.answer: We sincerely apologize if you received a defective or incorrect item. Please contact customer service within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the item and packaging. We will immediately send you a replacement at no charge with expedited shipping, or issue a full refund including original shipping costs.

sizeGuide.question: How do I know my size?
sizeGuide.answer: We provide detailed size charts for all products. Click on the "سائز Guide" link available on every product page. Our size charts include measurements in both inches and centimeters, along with fit tips. We also offer a "True to سائز" rating based on customer reviews.

authentic.question: Are all products authentic?
authentic.answer: Absolutely! We guarantee 100% authentic products. We source directly from authorized brand distributors and manufacturers. Every product comes with authenticity documentation when applicable. We have a zero-tolerance policy for counterfeit items.

restock.question: Do you restock sold-out items?
restock.answer: Many popular items are restocked regularly! You can sign up for restock notifications on any sold-out product page by clicking "نہیںtify Me When دستیاب." You will receive an email as soon as the item is back in stock. Some seasonal or limited-edition items may not be restocked.

preorder.question: Can I pre-order products?
preorder.answer: ہاں, select upcoming products are available for pre-order. Pre-order items are clearly marked on the product page with an expected ship date. Your payment method will be charged when you place the pre-order. You can cancel a pre-order anytime before the item ships for a full refund.

inStock.question: How do I know if a product is in stock?
inStock.answer: مصنوعہ availability is displayed in real-time on each product page. If an item shows as "اسٹاک میں," it is available for immediate purchase. Items marked "Low Stock" have limited quantities remaining. "اسٹاک میں نہیں" items cannot be purchased currently, but you can sign up for restock notifications.

careInstructions.question: Do products come with care instructions?
careInstructions.answer: ہاں! سب clothing and textile products include care tags with washing and maintenance instructions. Detailed care information is also available on each product page under the "Care میںstructions" section.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American ایکسپریس, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and دکان Pay. We also offer Klarna and Afterpay for buy-now-pay-later options on eligible purchases. Gift cards and store credit can also be applied during checkout.

paymentSecure.question: Is my payment information secure?
paymentSecure.answer: Absolutely! We take your security seriously. Our website uses industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your personal and payment information. We are PCI DSS compliant and never store your complete credit card information on our servers.

multiplePayment.question: Can I use multiple payment methods for one order?
multiplePayment.answer: Currently, you can use one primary payment method per order. However, you can combine a gift card or store credit with any payment method. If you need to split payment between multiple cards, please contact customer service and we can assist you.

paymentPlans.question: Do you offer payment plans?
paymentPlans.answer: ہاں! We partner with Klarna and Afterpay to offer flexible payment plans. You can split your purchase into 4 interest-free payments over 6 weeks, or choose longer-term financing options for eligible purchases over $100.

paymentDeclined.question: Why was my payment declined?
paymentDeclined.answer: ادائیگی declines can occur for several reasons: insufficient funds, incorrect card information, expired card, billing address mismatch, or security holds from your bank. Please verify your payment details and try again. If the problem persists, contact your bank or try a different payment method.

createAccount.question: How do I create an account?
createAccount.answer: Creating an account is quick and easy! Click "سائن اپ" or "اکاؤنٹ بنائیں" at the top of any page. Enter your email address, create a secure password, and provide your basic information. You can also sign up using your Google or Facebook account.

forgotPassword.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
forgotPassword.answer: نہیں problem! Click "پاس ورڈ بھول گئے?" on the login page. Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link within a few minutes. Click the link in the email and follow the prompts to create a new password.

updateAccount.question: How do I update my account information?
updateAccount.answer: Log into your account and click on "Account ترتیبات" or "پروفائل." سے there, you can update your personal information, email address, password, shipping addresses, and payment methods. Changes are saved automatically.

deleteAccount.question: Can I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: ہاں, you have the right to delete your account at any time. Go to Account ترتیبات and select "حذف کریں Account" at the bottom of the page. Please note that deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.

emailPreferences.question: How do I manage my email preferences?
emailPreferences.answer: You can manage all email preferences in your Account ترتیبات under "Communication Preferences." Choose which types of emails you want to receive: order updates, promotional offers, new arrivals, sale notifications, and more.

physicalStores.question: Do you have physical stores?
physicalStores.answer: We are primarily an online retailer to bring you the best prices and widest selection. However, we do have flagship stores in select cities. Visit our "اسٹور Locator" page to find the nearest location, hours, and directions.

contactService.question: How can I contact customer service?
contactService.answer: We are here to help! رابطہ us via: Live Chat (available 24/7 on our website), ای میل (support@example.com, response within 24 hours), فون (Monday-Friday 9AM-9PM EST, Saturday-Sunday 10AM-6PM EST), or Social Media (DM us on میںstagram, Facebook, or Twitter).

giftCards.question: Do you offer gift cards?
giftCards.answer: ہاں! Our gift cards are the perfect gift for anyone who loves shopping. دستیاب in denominations from $25 to $500, our gift cards never expire and have no fees. You can purchase e-gift cards for instant delivery via email, or physical gift cards shipped in a beautiful presentation box.

promotions.question: Are there any promotions or discount codes?
promotions.answer: We regularly offer promotions, sales, and exclusive discounts! Sign up for our email newsletter to receive a 15% off welcome code and be the first to know about upcoming sales. Follow us on social media for special promo codes and limited-time discounts.

priceMatch.question: What is your price match policy?
priceMatch.answer: We want you to get the best value! If you find an identical item at a lower price from an authorized online competitor, contact us within 7 days of purchase with proof of the lower price. We will refund the difference if the item is in stock and the competitor is an authorized retailer.

powerfulAnalytics.title: Powerful تجزیات

deliveryManagement.title: ڈیلیوری انتظام

rights.description: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.description: رابطہ our privacy team for any concerns.

introduction.title: 1. میںtroduction
introduction.p1: At My دکان ("we," "our," or "us"), we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This پرائیویسی پالیسی explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, mobile application, or use our services (collectively, the "Service").
introduction.p2: This پرائیویسی پالیسی applies to all information collected through our Service and any related services, sales, marketing, or events. Please read this پرائیویسی پالیسی carefully. By using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this پرائیویسی پالیسی.
introduction.p3: If you do not agree with the terms of this پرائیویسی پالیسی, please do not access or use our Service. We reserve the right to make changes to this پرائیویسی پالیسی at any time and for any reason. We will alert you about any changes by updating the "Last اپ ڈیٹd" date of this پرائیویسی پالیسی.
introduction.p4: This پرائیویسی پالیسی complies with applicable privacy laws and regulations, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer پرائیویسی Act (CCPA), and other relevant data protection legislation.

informationWeCollect.title: 2. میںformation We Collect
informationWeCollect.personalInfoDesc: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the Service, make a purchase, subscribe to our newsletter, or otherwise contact us. The personal information we collect may include:
personalInfoList: نام and contact information (email address, phone number, mailing address)
Demographic information (age, gender, date of birth)
Social media profile information (when you connect social accounts)
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoDesc: When you make a purchase, we collect payment information necessary to process your transaction. This may include:
paymentInfoList: Credit card or debit card numbers (tokenized and encrypted)
PayPal account information or other payment service details
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoNote: Please note that we do not store your complete credit card information on our servers. سب payment information is processed securely through third-party payment processors that comply with ادائیگی Card میںdustry Data Security معیاریs (PCI DSS).
informationWeCollect.autoCollectedDesc: When you access our Service, we automatically collect certain information about your device and usage patterns, including:
autoCollectedList: Device type, operating system, and unique device identifiers
Pages visited, time spent on pages, and navigation paths
Click-through data and interaction with features

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your میںformation
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect for various purposes, including:
list: تک process your orders: We use your information to fulfill and manage purchases, payments, returns, and exchanges
تک communicate with you: We send order confirmations, shipping updates, customer service responses, and account notifications
تک personalize your experience: We tailor product recommendations, content, and marketing based on your preferences and behavior
تک improve our Service: We analyze usage data to enhance features, optimize performance, and develop new products
تک send marketing communications: With your consent, we send promotional emails, special offers, and newsletters
تک prevent fraud and ensure security: We monitor for suspicious activity and protect against unauthorized access
تک comply with legal obligations: We process data as required by law, including tax reporting and regulatory compliance
تک conduct analytics and research: We aggregate and analyze data to understand trends and customer behavior
تک facilitate social features: We enable features like wishlists, reviews, and social sharing
تک administer promotions and contests: We manage participation in special events and promotional campaigns
howWeUse.outro: We process your personal information for these purposes based on our legitimate business interests, to fulfill our contract with you, with your consent, or to comply with our legal obligations.

cookies.title: 4. کوکیز & ٹریکنگ Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and store certain information. کوکیز are small data files stored on your device that help us improve your experience, understand usage patterns, and deliver targeted content.
typesList: Essential کوکیز: Necessary for the Service to function properly, including authentication, security, and shopping cart functionality
Performance کوکیز: مدد us understand how visitors interact with our Service by collecting anonymous usage data
Functional کوکیز: Remember your preferences and settings to enhance your experience
Targeting/Advertising کوکیز: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness
تجزیات کوکیز: سبow us to analyze visitor behavior and improve our Service (e.g., Google تجزیات)
cookies.managingDesc: You can control and manage cookies in various ways. Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies. Please note that if you choose to disable cookies, some features of our Service may not function properly.
cookies.managingNote: تک opt-out of interest-based advertising, you can visit the Digital Advertising سبiance's opt-out portal or the Network Advertising میںitiative's opt-out portal. For mobile devices, you can adjust your advertising preferences in your device settings.
cookies.cookieConsentDesc: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our Cookie ترتیبات in the footer of our website or by clicking the "Manage کوکیز" button.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing Your میںformation
sharing.intro: We may share your information in the following situations:
list: Service Providers: We share information with third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, shipping, email delivery, analytics, marketing, and customer service. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the purposes we specify.
Business Transfers: میں connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.

Legal Requirements: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or governmental request, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.
With Your Consent: We may share your information for any other purpose with your explicit consent.
Aggregated Data: We may share aggregated or anonymized data that cannot identify you personally for research, marketing, or analytical purposes.
Affiliated Companies: We may share information with our parent company, subsidiaries, and affiliates for business purposes consistent with this پرائیویسی پالیسی.
sharing.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We do not share your information with unaffiliated third parties for their own marketing purposes without your consent.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These measures include:
list: Encryption of data in transit using SSL/TLS protocols
Encryption of sensitive data at rest
Regular security assessments and vulnerability testing
Access controls and authentication requirements
Employee training on data protection and privacy
Secure data centers with physical and environmental controls
Regular backups and disaster recovery procedures
میںcident response and breach notification procedures
security.disclaimer: However, please note that no method of transmission over the میںternet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
security.responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Please notify us immediately if you become aware of any unauthorized access to or use of your account.

rights.title: 7. Your پرائیویسی Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location and applicable laws, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
rights.gdprIntro: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
gdprList: Right to Access: You can request access to your personal information and obtain a copy of the data we hold about you
Right to Rectification: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal information
Right to Erasure: You can request deletion of your personal information under certain circumstances
Right to Restrict پروسیسنگ: You can request that we limit the processing of your personal information
Right to Data Portability: You can request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object: You can object to the processing of your personal information for certain purposes
Right to Withdraw Consent: Where processing is based on consent, you can withdraw your consent at any time
Right to Lodge a Complaint: You can file a complaint with your local data protection authority
rights.ccpaIntro: If you are a California resident, you have the following rights under the California Consumer پرائیویسی Act (CCPA):
ccpaList: Right to Know: You can request information about the categories and specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you
Right to حذف کریں: You can request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions
Right to Opt-Out: You can opt-out of the sale of your personal information (we do not sell personal information)
Right to نہیںn-Discrimination: You have the right not to receive discriminatory treatment for exercising your CCPA rights
rights.exercisingIntro: تک exercise any of your privacy rights, you can:
exercisingList: Use the data request forms linked below
rights.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days. We may need to verify your identity before processing your request.

children.title: 8. Children's پرائیویسی
children.p1: Our Service is not intended for children under 13 years of age (or under 16 in the EEA). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under these ages. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us at support@example.com.
children.p2: If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under the applicable age without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information from our servers promptly.
children.p3: We encourage parents and guardians to monitor their children's میںternet usage and help enforce this پرائیویسی پالیسی by instructing their children never to provide personal information through our Service without their permission.

international.title: 9. میںternational Data Transfers
international.p1: Your information, including personal information, may be transferred to and maintained on computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
international.p2: If you are located outside the United States and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the information, including personal information, to the United States and process it there. Your consent to this پرائیویسی پالیسی followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.
international.p3: We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this پرائیویسی پالیسی. We use appropriate safeguards such as معیاری Contractual Clauses approved by the European کمیشن for transfers of personal information from the EEA to countries that do not provide adequate protection.

thirdParty.title: 10. Third-Party Links
thirdParty.p1: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites, applications, or services that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party's site. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of every site you visit.
thirdParty.p2: We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services. We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites.
thirdParty.p3: Some examples of third-party services we may link to or integrate with include:
list: Social media platforms (Facebook, میںstagram, Twitter, Pinterest)
ادائیگی processors (PayPal, Stripe, Square)
شپنگ carriers (UPS, FedEx, USPS)
تجزیات services (Google تجزیات, Mixpanel)
گاہک service platforms (Zendesk, میںtercom)
ای میل marketing services (Mailchimp, SendGrid)

retention.title: 11. Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this پرائیویسی پالیسی, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. The criteria we use to determine retention periods include:
criteriaList: The length of time we have an ongoing relationship with you and provide our Service
Whether there is a legal obligation to which we are subject (e.g., tax, accounting, or legal requirements)
Whether retention is advisable in light of our legal position (e.g., regarding statutes of limitations, litigation, or regulatory investigations)
periodsList: Account میںformation: Retained while your account is active and for 3 years after account closure
Purchase History: Retained for 7 years for tax and accounting purposes
Marketing Data: Retained until you opt-out or request deletion
گاہک Service Records: Retained for 3 years after the last interaction
Website تجزیات: Typically aggregated and anonymized after 26 months
retention.outro: After the retention period expires, we will securely delete or anonymize your personal information in accordance with applicable law.

changes.title: 12. Changes to پرائیویسی پالیسی
changes.p1: We may update our پرائیویسی پالیسی from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new پرائیویسی پالیسی on this page and updating the "Last اپ ڈیٹd" date at the top of this پرائیویسی پالیسی.
changes.p2: For material changes, we will provide additional notice, which may include:
list: Sending you an email notification to the address associated with your account
Displaying a prominent notice on our website or mobile application
Requesting your consent for the changes where required by law
changes.p3: We encourage you to review this پرائیویسی پالیسی periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information. Your continued use of our Service after we post any modifications to the پرائیویسی پالیسی will constitute your acknowledgment of the modifications and your consent to abide by the modified پرائیویسی پالیسی.

contact.title: 13. رابطہ Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this پرائیویسی پالیسی or our privacy practices, please contact us:
contact.hours: Hours: Monday - Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST
contact.commitment: We are committed to resolving complaints about your privacy and our collection or use of your personal information. We will investigate and attempt to resolve complaints and disputes in accordance with the principles described in this پرائیویسی پالیسی.
contact.euComplaint: For EU users, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority if you believe we have not adequately addressed your concerns.

privacy.introText: This پرائیویسی پالیسی describes how My دکان ("we," "our," or "us") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you visit or make a purchase from our e-commerce platform. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices. This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer پرائیویسی Act (CCPA), and other applicable privacy laws.
privacy.footerNote: By using My دکان, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this پرائیویسی پالیسی. If you have any questions or concerns about how we handle your personal information, please contact our پرائیویسی کاficer at support@example.com. We are committed to addressing your privacy concerns promptly and transparently.

terms.title: شرائط & Conditions

needHelp.title: Need مدد?
needHelp.description: Have questions about our terms? Our legal team is here to help.

introduction.title: 1. میںtroduction
introduction.p1: خوش آمدید to My دکان ("we," "our," or "us"). These شرائط and Conditions ("شرائط") govern your access to and use of the My دکان website, mobile applications, and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these شرائط.
introduction.p2: Please read these شرائط carefully before using our Service. If you do not agree to these شرائط, you may not access or use the Service. We reserve the right to update, change, or replace any part of these شرائط by posting updates and changes to our website. It is your responsibility to check our website periodically for changes.
introduction.p3: Your continued use of or access to our Service following the posting of any changes to these شرائط constitutes acceptance of those changes. These شرائط apply to all visitors, users, and others who wish to access or use our Service.

acceptance.title: 2. قبولance of شرائط
acceptance.p1: By creating an account, placing an order, or otherwise using our Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these شرائط, as well as our پرائیویسی پالیسی. If you are using our Service on behalf of an organization, you are agreeing to these شرائط for that organization and representing that you have the authority to bind that organization to these شرائط.
acceptance.p2: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Service. By using our Service, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these شرائط. If you are under 18, you may use our Service only with the involvement and consent of a parent or legal guardian.
acceptance.p3: We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders at our sole discretion, including but not limited to situations where we believe there has been a violation of these شرائط or any applicable law.

useOfWebsite.title: 3. Use of the Website
useOfWebsite.permittedP1: Subject to your compliance with these شرائط, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to access and use our Service for your personal, non-commercial use. You may browse our products, place orders, create an account, and use the features we make available through our Service.
useOfWebsite.permittedP2: You agree to use our Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these شرائط. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Service complies with all applicable local, state, national, and international laws and regulations.
prohibitedList: Use the Service in any way that violates any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation
Engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the Service, or which may harm My دکان or users of the Service
Use the Service to transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any "junk mail," "chain letter," "spam," or any other similar solicitation
Impersonate or attempt to impersonate My دکان, a My دکان employee, another user, or any other person or entity
Engage in any automated use of the system, such as using scripts to send comments or messages, or using any data mining, robots, or similar data gathering and extraction tools
میںterfere with, disrupt, or create an undue burden on the Service or the networks or services connected to the Service
Attempt to bypass any measures of the Service designed to prevent or restrict access to the Service, or any portion of the Service
کاپی, modify, create derivative works of, reverse engineer, decompile, or otherwise attempt to extract the source code of the Service

Use the Service to harass, abuse, insult, harm, defame, slander, disparage, intimidate, or discriminate based on gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, race, age, national origin, or disability
جمع کرائیں false or misleading information or upload malicious code, viruses, or any other harmful content

accountReg.title: 4. Account Registration
accountReg.creationP1: تک access certain features of our Service, you may be required to create an account. When you create an account, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of these شرائط, which may result in immediate termination of your account.
accountReg.creationP2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, and you agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.
accountReg.securityP1: You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity that is not lawfully available for use, or a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar, or obscene.
accountReg.securityP2: We reserve the right to refuse registration of, or cancel, a username in our sole discretion. You are solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account, and you must keep your account password secure. We recommend using a strong password and enabling two-factor authentication where available.

products.title: 5. مصنوعہ میںformation & Pricing
products.descriptionsP1: We make every effort to display as accurately as possible the colors, features, specifications, and details of the products available on our Service. However, we do not guarantee that product descriptions, colors, information, or other content available on our Service are accurate, complete, reliable, current, or error-free.
products.descriptionsP2: مصنوعہ images are for illustrative purposes only and may not always be an exact representation of the product. We reserve the right to limit the quantities of any products that we offer and to discontinue any product at any time without notice.
products.pricingP1: سب prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the Service (or any part or content thereof) without notice at any time. قیمتs for our products are subject to change without notice.
products.pricingP2: میں the event of a pricing error, we reserve the right to refuse or cancel any orders placed for products listed at the incorrect price. We will notify you if this occurs and provide you with the option to wait for the item to be available at the correct price or cancel your order.
products.pricingP3: Some products may be available exclusively online through our Service. These products may have limited quantities and are subject to return or exchange only according to our Return پالیسی.

orders.title: 6. آرڈرز & ادائیگی
orders.acceptanceP1: سب orders placed through our Service are subject to acceptance by My دکان. We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to refuse or cancel any order for any reason, including but not limited to product availability, errors in product or pricing information, or problems identified by our fraud detection systems.
orders.acceptanceP2: Your receipt of an order confirmation does not signify our acceptance of your order, nor does it constitute confirmation of our offer to sell. We reserve the right to limit or prohibit orders that, in our sole judgment, appear to be placed by dealers, resellers, or distributors.
orders.methodsP1: We accept various payment methods including credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American ایکسپریس, Discover), debit cards, PayPal, and other payment methods as displayed during checkout. You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase and account information for all purchases made via our Service.
orders.methodsP2: You agree to promptly update your account and payment information, including email address, payment method, and card expiration date, so that we can complete your transactions and contact you as needed. فروخت tax will be added to the price of purchases as deemed required by us.
orders.securityP1: سب payment transactions are processed through secure payment gateways that comply with industry-standard security protocols. We do not store your complete credit card information on our servers. Your payment information is encrypted and securely transmitted to our payment processors.
orders.securityP2: You authorize us to charge your payment method for the total amount of your order, including any applicable taxes and shipping charges. If your payment method cannot be verified, is invalid, or is not otherwise acceptable, your order may be suspended or cancelled.

shipping.title: 7. شپنگ & ڈیلیوری
shipping.p1: We offer various shipping options at checkout, including standard, expedited, and express delivery. شپنگ costs are calculated based on the delivery address, package weight, and selected shipping method. سب delivery times are estimates and are not guaranteed.
shipping.p2: پرce your order has shipped, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking information. We are not responsible for delays caused by shipping carriers, customs clearance, or other factors outside our control. Title and risk of loss for all products pass to you upon delivery to the shipping carrier.
shipping.p3: For international orders, you may be subject to import duties and taxes, which are levied once the package reaches your country. شامل کریںitional charges for customs clearance must be borne by you; we have no control over these charges. Customs policies vary widely from country to country, so you should contact your local customs office for further information.
shipping.p4: If you refuse to accept delivery of a package, we reserve the right to charge you for return shipping costs and a restocking fee. Packages that are returned to us as undeliverable due to incorrect address information provided by you may be subject to additional shipping charges for re-delivery.

returns.title: 8. Returns & رقم کی واپسیs
returns.p1: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied, you may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange. Items must be in their original condition with all tags attached and in their original packaging.
returns.p2: Certain items are not eligible for return, including but not limited to: intimate apparel, swimwear, earrings, final sale items, personalized items, and gift cards. سب returns are subject to inspection, and we reserve the right to refuse returns that do not meet our return policy requirements.
returns.p3: تک initiate a return, please contact our customer service team at support@example.com with your order number and reason for return. We will provide you with a return authorization and instructions. یاiginal shipping charges are non-refundable, and you are responsible for return shipping costs unless the return is due to our error.
returns.p4: رقم کی واپسیs will be processed within 5-10 business days of receiving your returned item and will be issued to the original payment method. If you received free shipping on your order, the cost of the shipping will be deducted from your refund. We recommend using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance for returns, as we cannot guarantee receipt of your returned item.

ip.title: 9. میںtellectual Property
ip.p1: The Service and its entire contents, features, and functionality (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video, and audio, and the design, selection, and arrangement thereof) are owned by My دکان, its licensors, or other providers of such material and are protected by United States and international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.
ip.p2: The My دکان name, logo, and all related names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans are trademarks of My دکان or its affiliates or licensors. You must not use such marks without our prior written permission. سب other names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans on this Service are the trademarks of their respective owners.
ip.p3: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, republish, download, store, or transmit any of the material on our Service, except as generally and ordinarily permitted through the Service according to these شرائط or as expressly authorized by us in writing.
ip.p4: If you believe that any content on our Service violates your intellectual property rights, please contact us at support@example.com with detailed information about the alleged infringement. We will investigate and take appropriate action in accordance with applicable law.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PROVIDED BY LAW, IN NO EVENT WILL MY SHOP, ITS AFFILIATES, OR THEIR LICENSORS, SERVICE PROVIDERS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OFFICERS, OR DIRECTORS BE LIABLE FOR DAMAGES OF ANY KIND, UNDER ANY LEGAL THEORY, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE, OR INABILITY TO USE, THE SERVICE, ANY WEBSITES LINKED TO IT, ANY CONTENT ON THE SERVICE OR SUCH OTHER WEBSITES, INCLUDING ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.
liability.p2: This includes but is not limited to personal injury, pain and suffering, emotional distress, loss of revenue, loss of profits, loss of business or anticipated savings, loss of use, loss of goodwill, loss of data, and whether caused by tort (including negligence), breach of contract, or otherwise, even if foreseeable.
liability.p3: The foregoing does not affect any liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law. IN NO EVENT SHALL OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL DAMAGES, LOSSES, AND CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEED THE AMOUNT PAID BY YOU TO MY SHOP IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRIOR TO THE EVENT GIVING RISE TO LIABILITY, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.
liability.p4: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain damages, so some of the above exclusions and limitations may not apply to you. میں such jurisdictions, our liability will be limited to the greatest extent permitted by law.

disputes.title: 11. Dispute Resolution
disputes.informalP1: If you have any dispute with us, you agree to first contact us at support@example.com and attempt to resolve the dispute with us informally. We will attempt to resolve any disputes through informal negotiations in good faith. Both parties agree to make reasonable efforts to settle any dispute, claim, question, or disagreement directly through consultation with one another.
disputes.arbitrationP1: If we cannot resolve the dispute through informal negotiations, any legal dispute arising out of or relating to these شرائط or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the American Arbitration Association. The arbitration will be conducted in English in the United States.
disputes.arbitrationP2: You agree to waive your right to a jury trial and to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration. The arbitrator's decision will be final and binding, and judgment on the award may be entered in any court having jurisdiction.
disputes.arbitrationP3: نہیںtwithstanding the foregoing, either party may seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to prevent the actual or threatened infringement, misappropriation, or violation of a party's copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, patents, or other intellectual property rights.

changes.title: 12. Changes to شرائط
changes.p1: We reserve the right to update, change, or replace any part of these شرائط at any time at our sole discretion. It is your responsibility to check our website periodically for changes. Your continued use of or access to the Service following the posting of any changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
changes.p2: When we make material changes to these شرائط, we will notify you by updating the "Last اپ ڈیٹd" date at the top of these شرائط and, where appropriate, by sending you an email notification or by posting a notice on our website. We encourage you to review these شرائط whenever you access the Service or otherwise interact with us to stay informed about our terms and conditions.
changes.p3: If you do not agree to the modified شرائط, you must discontinue your use of the Service. The amended شرائط will be effective immediately upon posting for new users and thirty (30) days after posting for existing users, except for changes required by law which will be effective immediately.

contact.title: 13. رابطہ میںformation
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback about these شرائط or our Service, please contact us:

contact.responseTime: We strive to respond to all inquiries within 1-2 business days. For urgent matters, please call our customer service line. Our team is committed to providing you with excellent service and addressing any concerns you may have.

cookies.title: Cookie پالیسی
cookies.subtitle: Learn how we use cookies to improve your experience

whatAreCookies.title: What Are کوکیز?
whatAreCookies.content: کوکیز are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences, analyzing site traffic, and personalizing content.

essential.title: Essential کوکیز
essential.description: ضروری for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas.

analytics.title: تجزیات کوکیز
analytics.description: مدد us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing کوکیز
marketing.description: Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.

preference.title: Preference کوکیز
preference.description: سبow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced features.

managing.title: Managing کوکیز
managing.content1: You can control and manage cookies in your browser settings. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your user experience and some functionality may no longer be available.
managing.content2: Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent. Refer to your browser's help section to learn how to change your cookie preferences.

cookies.moreInfo: For more information about how we handle your data, please read our پرائیویسی پالیسی.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Request
dataDeletion.subtitle: Request the permanent deletion of your personal data from our platform.
dataDeletion.warningContent: Data deletion is permanent and irreversible. پرce processed, all your personal data will be permanently removed from our systems and cannot be recovered. This includes your account, order history, and all associated information.

submit.title: جمع کرائیں Request
submit.description: Fill out the data deletion request form with your registered email address.

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: We'll send a verification email to confirm your identity and request.

processing.title: پروسیسنگ
processing.description: Your request will be processed within 30 days as per GDPR requirements.

confirmation.title: تصدیقation
confirmation.description: You'll receive confirmation once your data has been permanently deleted.
